hero.subtitle: Global Food Trading — Frozen & Chilled Products
hero.headline: WE MOVE PROTEIN. GLOBALLY.

about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: With over 25 years of experience in the global protein trade, Natural Trade has established itself as a trusted bridge between producers and markets worldwide.
about.p2: We specialize in sourcing, trading, and delivering premium frozen and chilled proteins — from South America to Africa, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. Our deep industry knowledge, combined with a vast network of suppliers and buyers, allows us to offer personalized solutions tailored to each client's needs.
about.p3: At Natural Trade, we don't just move products — we build lasting partnerships based on trust, transparency, and excellence.

value.title: Why Choose Us
value.years_desc: Over two decades of expertise in global protein trading and logistics.
value.network_desc: Deep connections across 4 continents with trusted suppliers and buyers.
value.service_desc: Dedicated support tailored to your specific business needs and goals.
